tools.name: index_repo
tools.description: Index repository files and return a conservative inventory.

tools.name: extract_tasks
tools.description: Extract proposed work orders from an ADR file.

tools.name: build_task_graph
tools.description: Build a task graph from ADR and lane inputs.

tools.name: check_conflicts
tools.description: Return conflict report for a task graph.

tools.name: ready_tasks
tools.description: Return tasks ready for a lane.

tools.name: agent_brief
tools.description: Render a bounded implementation brief for one work order.

tools.name: verify_diff_against_task
tools.description: Check changed files against a work order write set.

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Complete a claimed task after diff verification.

prompts.name: driftlock.worker_start
prompts.description: Start a worker from a ready claimed work order.

prompts.name: driftlock.planner_extract_adr
prompts.description: Extract candidate work orders from an ADR.

prompts.name: driftlock.reviewer_gate
prompts.description: Review a diff against a work order.

prompts.name: driftlock.maintainer_refresh
prompts.description: Refresh graph and resolve stale claims.
